name: Mercury Systems, Inc.
description: Mercury Systems, Inc. is a leading technology company that delivers open architecture computing solutions to the global aerospace and defense industry. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing secure, high-performance processing subsystems and modules for applications such as electronic warfare, radar, and signals intelligence. By bridging the gap between commercial technology and defense requirements, Mercury Systems provides mission-critical solutions that enhance the capabilities of modern defense platforms. Headquartered in Andover, Massachusetts, the company serves major defense contractors and government agencies with innovative hardware and software technologies.
